name: Unified Model Discovery API
objective: Implement a unified model discovery system that allows OpenSofa PWA to access models from all coding agents using their existing API keys and configurations
exit_criteria: GET /api/models/discover returns models grouped by provider
OpenCode models discoverable via opencode models command
Claude Code models discoverable via settings.json parsing
Frontend shows model selector grouped by provider
Session creation works with selected model
Tests pass for adapters and endpoint
